global.description: The ad features a playful layout with a focus on product promotion.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with free shipping.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center element 1
elements.description: A rectangular shape located in the center of the ad, possibly representing a product or feature.

elements.label: Center element 2
elements.description: Another rectangular shape in the center, similar in size and position to the first element.

elements.label: Center element 3
elements.description: A third rectangular shape in the center, slightly taller than the previous two elements.

elements.label: Top left element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Top right element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape located at the top right of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom center element 1
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom center element 2
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned near the first circular element at the bottom.

elements.label: CrispBox UGC
elements.description: A bold, prominent text element at the top of the ad, likely indicating the brand or campaign.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: A descriptive text element at the bottom of the ad, conveying a promotional message.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A price display in a bold font, indicating the cost of a product at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text at the bottom, with circular elements centered.
